text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for training! All right, I'm gonna
give it my all to—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did something move just now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
H-h-how did you get in here?! Please, just get out
of here as quickly as possible!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Wait. Why aren't you moving? Are you just a
toy or something? Huh, I guess there's nothing to
worry ab—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Gyaaahhh! You just twitched! You're real!
Someone save me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no... You're right by the door. I can't get
out...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Please come back soon, Fuku...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to leave her room, Matikanetannhauser
ends up missing training.
